name: Interstate
description_short: Interstate Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving Southeast Georgia with checking, savings, loans, and ATM access across six branch locations.
description_long: Interstate Credit Union operates as a federally-insured credit union serving the Southeast Georgia region, including communities in Jesup, Baxley, Hazlehurst, Midway, Brunswick, and Douglas. The organization is structured as a membership-based cooperative financial institution with routing number 261272826, offering traditional banking services typical of community credit unions. The credit union provides a range of deposit accounts including checking and savings products, personal loans with calculators and online application, and account access services. Members can manage accounts through online banking, order checks, and access member benefits including insurance products. The institution emphasizes accessibility with multiple service channels including web chat, text messaging, and in-person branch locations. Interstate distinguishes itself through its deep local presence in Southeast Georgia with six full-service branches offering consistent operating hours, plus 24/7 ATM access at Coffee Regional Medical Center in Douglas. The credit union provides nationwide account access through the CO-OP Shared Branch network and surcharge-free ATM access via MoneyPass and Culiance networks, extending its utility beyond its immediate service area. The organization maintains a focus on member education and community engagement. The institution's service area is geographically limited to Southeast Georgia, making it most suitable for residents and workers in that region.
services: Checking accounts with online and in-person access
Savings accounts with competitive rates available
Personal loans with online calculators and loan application
Online banking platform for account management
Account access through CO-OP Shared Branch network nationwide
Surcharge-free ATM network access via MoneyPass and Culiance
pros: Six full-service branch locations in Southeast Georgia with consistent weekday hours (9am-4:30pm lobby, extended drive-thru to 5pm Thu-Fri)
24/7 ATM access at Coffee Regional Medical Center location for after-hours cash access
Nationwide account access through CO-OP Shared Branch network allowing members to conduct transactions at thousands of participating credit unions
Surcharge-free ATM network access through MoneyPass and Culiance networks beyond local branches
Online account application and banking services available for account management and loan applications
Member benefits program including insurance products and educational resources
Saturday drive-thru hours available at Jesup and Baxley branches (9am-1pm) for weekend banking
cons: Limited service area restricted to Southeast Georgia; no branches outside the six-county region for local walk-in service
Specific interest rates and APR terms not clearly displayed on the publicly accessible website, requiring members to contact branches directly
Limited weekend lobby access; only Saturday drive-thru available and no Sunday hours at any location
Smaller institution may have fewer advanced digital banking features compared to larger national banks and credit unions
No information available about minimum balance requirements, monthly fees, or account maintenance costs on the accessible website
best_for: Southeast Georgia residents and workers in Jesup, Baxley, Hazlehurst, Midway, Brunswick, and Douglas areas seeking local banking relationships
Community members who prefer member-owned cooperative financial institutions over corporate banks
Individuals who value in-person branch service and local decision-making for loan and account management
Credit union members nationwide who can leverage CO-OP network access while maintaining primary account with Interstate
diagnosis: Interstate Credit Union is best for residents of Southeast Georgia seeking relationship-based community banking with multiple local branches and member ownership benefits. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—members outside the six-branch service area should confirm access needs through the CO-OP network, and prospective members should contact branches directly to verify current rates and account requirements not displayed online.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Interstate — Credit Union in Jesup, GA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Interstate — NCUA-insured credit union in Jesup, GA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
